name: 简约段落标题
author: r-markdown
description: 文字下方的线条长度和颜色需要根据文字长度自行调整
content:
<!-- 素材开始 -->
<stack width="750px" height="30px" margin="20px 0">
<positioned top="0" left="0" width="100%" height="100%" z-index="1">
<container padding="0px" margin="0 0 20px" border-style="none" radius="0px" align="start-start">
<text size="18px" weight="600">一、我是一个自定义的段落标题</text>
</container>
</positioned>

<positioned top="15px" left="5px" width="90%" z-index="0">
<container width="240px" height="10px" padding="0px" margin="0px" bg="#fbc709" border-style="none" radius="8px" rotate="-2deg" align="start-start"></container>
</positioned>
</stack>
<!-- 素材结束 -->
